<think> I know that Coelogyne is a genus of orchids, and orchids are a large and diverse family of flowering plants. Daboecia, on the other hand, is a genus of flowering plants in the heath family, and while it is a distinct group, it is not as large as the orchid family. I also recall that Coelogyne has many species, including Coelogyne cristata, Coelogyne pandurata, and Coelogyne pandurata var. alba, among others. I'm not as familiar with Daboecia, but I know it has fewer species than Coelogyne. Therefore, I conclude that Coelogyne has more species than Daboecia. </think>
<answer> Coelogyne </answer>
